#### Questions and Answers
- EB-5 Questions and Answers
On April 30, 2015, the Secretary of Homeland Security issued Ethics and Integrity: Protocols for Processing of EB-5 Immigrant Investor Visa Petitions and EB-5 Regional Center Applications, Including Stakeholder Communications .
Some DHS and USCIS employees must take EB-5 Ethics and Integrity Protocols Training .
